channel.title: Websocket on norbix.dev - The log of my journey through code & software systems architecture
channel.description: Recent content in Websocket on norbix.dev - The log of my journey through code & software systems architecture

item.title: REST vs GraphQL vs WebSocket vs gRPC: API Styles and Contracts in Go
item.description: From REST to GraphQL, WebSocket, and gRPC — explore API communication patterns and how contracts like OpenAPI, Swagger, and Protobuf shape modern Go systems.

item.title: API Modeling in Distributed Systems: REST, WebSocket, gRPC, and GraphQL
item.description: Learn how modern distributed systems use REST, gRPC, WebSocket, and GraphQL together. Explore architectural tradeoffs, communication patterns, scalability concerns, and real-world API modeling strategies.
